field.label: Tunnel Token
field.help: Tunnel token from the Cloudflare Zero Trust dashboard.

field.label: Protocol
field.help: Transport protocol. Leave unset unless you have a specific reason to force QUIC or HTTP/2.

field.label: Post-Quantum Encryption
field.help: Enable post-quantum cryptography for the tunnel connection (requires QUIC).

field.label: Disable QUIC PMTU Discovery
field.help: Disable Path MTU Discovery for QUIC connections. May help in environments where ICMP is blocked.

field.label: Edge IP Version
field.help: Force the IP version used to connect to Cloudflare's edge. Leave on Auto unless you need to restrict to IPv4 or IPv6.

field.label: Log Level
field.help: Verbosity of cloudflared logging. Defaults to info. Use debug for troubleshooting; warn or error for quieter operation.
